## Validation

- [ ] `bun run check` passed locally
- [ ] CI quality checks passed
- [ ] Workflow or documentation changes were reviewed for security-sensitive permissions, secrets, and triggers

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is tied to the stated intent
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are addressed
- [ ] Tests or validation notes cover the changed behavior
- [ ] No commits, pushes, merges, or lifecycle transitions were automated without explicit approval
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or process changed
